output.summary: Replace editor icons for FooterNavColumnItem, FooterInfoSocial, and FooterInfoSocialItem with simpler representative shapes, and add flex-wrap to FooterInfoSocial so social links wrap when there are too many.

fileChanges.description: Replace arrow icon with a black rectangle representing a nav item
fileChanges.details: Create a simple filled black rectangle (e.g., a horizontal bar) that visually represents a navigation link item. Use viewBox 0 0 24 24, fill currentColor, a rect element approximately 16x4 centered in the viewBox.

fileChanges.description: Replace three circles with three squares 1px apart representing social icons
fileChanges.details: Create three small filled squares arranged horizontally with 1px gaps between them. Use viewBox 0 0 24 24, fill currentColor. Three rects of equal size (e.g., 6x6) spaced 1px apart, centered vertically in the viewBox.

fileChanges.description: Replace circle-plus icon with a simple black square
fileChanges.details: Create a single filled black square centered in the viewBox. Use viewBox 0 0 24 24, fill currentColor, a single rect element (e.g., 14x14 centered at 5,5).

fileChanges.description: Add flex-wrap to the social links ul so items wrap to the next line when there are too many
fileChanges.details: Change className from 'flex gap-3 items-center' to 'flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-center' on the ul element (line 17).

fileChanges.description: Add flex-wrap to the social links ul in PHP to match TSX
fileChanges.details: Change the ul class from 'flex gap-3 items-center' to 'flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-center' on line 14.

designDecisions.decision: FooterNavColumnItem icon: a horizontal filled rectangle representing a text line / nav item
designDecisions.evidence: User requested 'a black rectangle representing the item'

designDecisions.decision: FooterInfoSocial icon: three filled squares arranged horizontally with 1px gaps
designDecisions.evidence: User requested 'three squares 1px apart representing icons'

designDecisions.decision: FooterInfoSocialItem icon: a single filled square
Add flex-wrap to social links container so icons wrap to next line when too many are present
designDecisions.evidence: User asked to check that too many social links wraps; current code lacks flex-wrap, causing overflow instead of wrapping
